'''Joi Eicroth''' was a fair haired [[Gender/Legends|female]] who, for a short time, was the wife of [[Hiram Drayson/Legends|Hiram Drayson]].

==Biography==
During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]], Joi was hired to work on the [[Qella]] remains found on [[Brath Qella]]. An exobiologist, she was a member of [[Alpha Blue]] and in [[25 ABY/Legends|25.5 ABY]] was a member of a xenobiology team analyzing the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

{{Char-stub}}
